title: [硬件撚]討論硬件知識、砌機LIST、解答問題集中帖(165) 望下#1 先

replies.msg:
新人求List需知
買前好問問 買後問懵撚

為方便連登眾巴絲可以幫助你，請你合作
不但可以令連登眾巴絲可以盡快回覆你的問題，更可以令條List更適合你所需

關於所有店舖事項請巴打從其他有效方式聯絡

顯卡係蝗語，請講顯示卡或display card


1. Budget
NO MONEY NO TALK ，預算上限寬鬆可以買好一點，預算太低可能要將就或繼續儲錢

打機INTEL
多工AMD
intel low budget 留意返真。唔超就cpu:8700 or below, mb: b360, ram: 8*2 2666Mhz ddr4

2. 電腦主要用途
你想玩咩遊戲? (多數砌機都會打機，如果唔係請另外講明)
最好講game名，唔好一句Steam game/blizzard/EA game就算
因為成千上萬隻人地唔知你玩邊隻
需唔需要直播或錄製遊戲影片?

3. 個人需求
玩以上遊戲你最低可接受嘅畫質(Ultra/高/中/低)?最低可接受幾fps?
如果你預計會玩新遊戲，想幾耐唔駛升級電腦硬件?
想唔想超頻?散熱需求如何?使唔使靜過Dyson?
有冇特定嘅牌子信仰?想唔想有華麗嘅RGB光效?

4. 現在或將會使用mon的類型
解像度有分1080p, 2K(1440p), 4K(2160p)
更新頻率有分60Hz, 144Hz, 240Hz
畫面比例有分 16:9, 21:9, 32:9
你想要咩解像度(畫質)同更新頻率(流暢度)?
解像度高，會對打機效能造成影響，但畫質會更好
更新頻率高，如效能足夠可以造成比低更新頻率更好嘅流暢度

5. 自己都學習一些
講真，班巴絲好憎伸手黨，所以建議你行多一兩步
哪怕你直接照抄List放上黎問，佢地都會出手幫助
只係Ctrl-C和Ctrl-V咁簡單，大家都會開心嘅事點解唔做呢?
甚至可能你在過程中已經搵到需要的答案都不一定!
(悠二List網站 : http://yujihw.com
飛馬：https://shop.pegasushk.net/customize-pc/?MTE3MTgsNDU3Nw==
Jumbo：https://shoponjc.com/compset.php,)

6. 大腦Google係一樣很有用的東西

7. 火牛： 平 Antec eco2, delta 500W(Comdex有賣) 貴 corsair RMx OR Evga G2/P2/T2 (G3 有人話QC 有問題 唔推)
PSU DB: http://www.orionpsudb.com/

8. 請上銅柱(MB and M.2),重覆檢查插好power,hdd led pin,HD AUDIO,MB 24PIN,usb2.0/3.0,fan pin(cpu,cha) or 3pin 4pin
（仲有走好線先）

9. 召喚硬件傳心師
冇人知你部機咩spec 呀
你有咩壞野問題唔該貼返full spec
CPU, MB, RAM, DISPLAY CARD, PSU etc.
如果開唔到機請附上機箱內部圖片一張

10.
邊到買野好？
3C1J
黃金：中央田 CentralField
黃金：正都 Capital
黃金：匯訊 Comdex
旺電：珍寶 Jumbo

網店：
faroll (悠二白汁腸)
hkterminal
飛馬電腦

海外：
新蛋 NewEgg
美馬 Amazon
(R free shipping 小心畀人開post 話乞衣
你屌返佢轉頭當打和喇)

11.
AMD 拆cpu cooler 前記得整熱部機
Amd 拔劍有事幫你唔到

12.
H310 A320 不了
真係冇budget 先考慮
Cooler Master 不是好東西
見親都係叫你轉嫁喇

13. 買咩箱好
500樓下:
ATX: Antec P7/8, DeepCool MATREXX 55
MATX: Silverstone PS15B, Antec P6
ITX: Sharkon C10 mini

1000樓下:
ATX: FD Define C,Antec P110,SilverStone RL06
MATX: FD Define Mini C
ITX: FD Node 304/ Node 202, NZXT H200, SilverStone RVZ 01/02/03

1000樓上:
ATX: FD Define R6, Phanteks P600S, lian-li O11 dynamic, Corsair 680X
MATX: Corsair 280X
ITX: Inwin A1plus

14. 檢測效能方法 - Afterburner(AB) + Rivatuner Statistics Server(RTSS)
AB為GPU OC software 咩牌子都用得
配合埋RTSS 就可以實現OSD 功能
有咩用? 如果你發現打機果時lag 或者想知部機依家效能有冇問題
利用AB + RTSS 就可以即時check 到哂CPU GPU usage 同 tempature.
EG: CPU/GPU過熱降頻 係咪要改善機箱風道?
CPU 長期100% 代表粒u 唔夠力
https://www.msi.com/page/afterburner

15. Uninstall GPU driver: 換任何卡請DDU 一次
DDU
https://www.guru3d.com/files-details/display-driver-uninstaller-download.html

15. For Advance Information
vrm 資料
amd : https://www.hardwareluxx.de/community/f12/pga-am4-mainboard-vrm-liste-1155146.html
intel :
https://www.hardwareluxx.de/community/f12/lga-1151-mainboard-vrm-liste-1175784.html

SK Hynix Begins Sampling of 96-Layer 1 Tb 3D QLC NAND

In a press release sent out this week, SK Hynix announced that it has started sampling the company's long-awaited 1 Tb 96-layer QLC NAND flash memory The new 1 Tb chip will enable SSD makers to build even higher capacity drives, taking advantage of QLC's higher bit density to bring down storage costs. Silicon Motion has already started development of turn-key SSDs featuring the new type of memory, whereas SK Hynix itself is working on its own datacenter drives based on QLC. SSDs using the new devices will be available sometime next year.

SK Hynix’s 1 Tb 3D QLC is based on charge trap flash (CTF) design with a peripheral circuits under cells (PUC) architecture that places logic (address decoding, page buffers, etc.) under the memory layers to reduce the memory's die size. The manufacturer says that usage of this architecture enabled it to reduce die area of the chip by over 10% when compared to competing 1 Tb 3D QLC NAND devices. Officially, SK Hynix calls its CTF + PUC NAND "4D NAND".

Like other SK Hynix 3D-V5 devices, the 1 Tb 3D QLC chip uses a 1.2 Gbps Toggle 3.0 I/O interface, which is faster than SK Hynix’s 72L 3D-V4 generation products. Meanwhile the chip also features a 64 KB page size (the smallest area of the flash memory that can be written in a single operation) and an 18 MB block size (the smallest area of the flash memory that can be erased in a single operation), which will further speed up performance of the new 3D-V5 devices compared to its predecessors. Finally, the memory device uses a quad-plane architecture.

Silicon Motion says that samples of SK Hynix’s 1 Tb 3D QLC NAND device met client SSD product requirements and that the company was "impressed" by the NAND's performance, which is a strong indicator that SMI's work on a platform featuring the said flash memory is well underway

https://www.anandtech.com/show/14318/sk-hynix-begins-sampling-of-96-layer-1-tb-qlc-nand

有個問題困擾咗我幾年想請教

部機主要有兩個問題，但我參透唔到呢兩個問題有咩共通點

1. 㩒Power制冇反應開唔著機
但唔理佢一陣，過一排㩒下又開得著正常使用，所以我唯有索性唔熄機 (Sleep mode有時都會出事)

2. No Signal Input
有時就算好彩開得著，個Mon又間唔時會show no signal input
呢個case，瘋狂嘗試重開 or 熄機過一陣唔理佢又可能會冇事
(試過買過隻買mon 同HDMI線都冇分別)

R到頭皮出血都唔知，到底係咪PSU定老母板出事呢？多謝各位

replies.msg: 可以再改改

SK Hynix CJR DDR4 顆粒超頻能力相當可怕，在不加電壓下要穩跑 DDR4-3800 CL17-19-19 絕對不成問題，要超上DDR4-4000+ CL19 只需要加電壓至 1.4~1.45V 就能穩行，難怪被說成 SAMSUNG B-Die 殺手。



在不調整時序及工作電壓下， 1.35V 下可穩超 DDR4-3800 CL17-19-19-38 2T，當再提升時脈至 DDR4-4000 的話，則需要把電壓提升至 1.4V，放寬時序至 CL18-20-20-42 2T，超上 DDR4-4200 則需要提升至 1.45V並放寬至 CL19-21-21-45 2T，以 DDR4-3200 XMP 記憶體來說相當誇張。



https://www.hkepc.com/17898/ARGB_冷頭Hynix_C-Die_Thermaltake_WaterRam_RGB_水冷記憶體
